name: 25_Speech_Emotion_Recognition_CNN_LSTM_RAVDESS_DL
query: Ninatafuta mradi wa utambuzi wa hisia za sauti kwa kutumia mfano wa CNN-LSTM na seti ya data ya RAVDESS, ambayo inapaswa kupakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess). Mradi unapaswa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya usindikaji wa sauti thabiti (kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa) na uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC, vilivyotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa CNN-LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Usahihi wa utambuzi unapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`, na matriki ya mkanganyiko inapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, API ya ndani inayofaa mtumiaji inapaswa kuundwa kwa kutumia Flask ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia, na utekelezaji unajumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
API ya ndani inaundwa kwa kutumia "Flask" ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia. Utekelezaji unapaswa kujumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji wa sauti inapaswa kuwa thabiti, kupunguza kelele kwa ufanisi huku ikihifadhi uadilifu wa ishara za sauti.
API ya ndani inapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ikiwa na maelekezo wazi ya kupakia faili na kufasiri matokeo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation for loading the RAVDESS dataset from Kaggle or Hugging Face. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder with a `load_dataset()` function that simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no code for downloading, accessing, or loading actual RAVDESS audio files from any source. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no operations related to loading the RAVDESS dataset were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. It does not implement any actual audio preprocessing, noise removal, or normalization. The file merely lists these requirements as strings in a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list and provides a `build_transforms()` function that returns a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — which is not actual audio processing code. There is no use of audio libraries (e.g., `librosa`, `scipy`, `noisereduce`) or any real signal processing logic for noise removal or normalization of audio data.

judge_stats.criteria: Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual MFCC feature extraction implementation. Instead, it only contains a placeholder/stub with metadata strings listing requirements (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`), a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a simple list. There is no import of audio processing libraries (e.g., `librosa`, `python_speech_features`, `torchaudio`) and no actual code that computes MFCC features from audio data. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is not a real implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual CNN-LSTM model implementation. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder with keyword lists (`KEYWORDS = ["CNN-LSTM", "lstm"]`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There are no actual neural network layers, no CNN components (e.g., Conv1D/Conv2D), no LSTM layers, no model architecture definition, and no use of any deep learning framework (e.g., TensorFlow/Keras or PyTorch). The file is essentially a stub that mimics the appearance of compliance without implementing the required CNN-LSTM model.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt` exists, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual recognition accuracy metrics. This indicates the file was not properly populated with real model evaluation results. No actual accuracy values (e.g., overall accuracy percentage, per-class accuracy, etc.) are stored in the file, confirming the requirement has not been genuinely fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, maudhui yake yanaonyesha hitilafu ya kusoma picha (`Error reading image file`), ikimaanisha faili haikusomwa wala kuthibitishwa kwa mafanikio. Zaidi ya hayo, trajekta haina rekodi yoyote ya hatua zinazohusiana na uzalishaji wa matriki ya mkanganyiko au uhifadhi wake. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba matriki ya mkanganyiko ilizalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kwa usahihi.

judge_stats.criteria: API ya ndani inaundwa kwa kutumia "Flask" ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia. Utekelezaji unapaswa kujumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/hci.py` file does not contain a Flask API implementation. Instead, it contains only a minimal stub/placeholder that defines requirement criteria strings and keywords (`"Flask"`, `"lstm"`), but has no actual Flask application code — no `from flask import Flask`, no route definitions (`@app.route`), no audio file upload handling, and no emotion recognition result responses. The file is essentially a benchmark metadata file, not a functional implementation.
